# Dia Browser Security Page - Feature Announcements

## Bug Bounty Program
- Responsible disclosure program through HackerOne
- Security researchers invited to report vulnerabilities
- "Your work helps us build a safer, more secure browsing experience for all"

## Prompt Injection Defense System
- "Dia won't open or follow LLM-generated URLs"
- Prevention of unauthorized tool access without user review
- Content preview before insertion into third-party sites
- Draft-based irreversible actions (calendar events, etc.)
- Restricted agentic mode context visibility
- URL filtering to prevent instruction hiding

## Chromium Patching Schedule
- Weekly releases every Thursday with latest stable Chromium
- Critical security fixes deployed within 48 hours

## Built-in Ad Blocker
- Controllable via "Dia > Settings > Privacy"

## Data Handling
- Local encrypted storage for conversations, history, bookmarks, and files
- Minimal data transmission to AI partners (restricted from training/retention)
- De-identified data retention limited to 30 days for improvement purposes
- Incognito mode with no data storage
- Selective data flagging for security/compliance purposes only

## Security Infrastructure
- Independent third-party security audits conducted annually
- Full-scope assessments and point-in-time reviews for high-risk features
- Disabled Chromium features including Google Accounts Integration and metrics reporting
- Role-based production access restrictions
- Data encrypted in transit and at rest
- Regular data collection audits

## Last Fetched
2026-03-29
